valid.text:
An old silent pond
A frog jumps into the pond
Splash silence again

Steam rises slowly
Patience rewards the waiting
First sip of pure bliss

Morning light breaks through
Coffee brewing fills the room
A new day begins

Leaves fall from the tree
Autumn wind whispers softly
Nature rests in peace

Steam rises slowly
Patience rewards the waiting
First sip of pure bliss

via @brew-haiku.app

The kettle sings out
Water poured over green leaves
Calm in every sip

Rain on the window
A cup of tea in my hands
The world feels complete

Moon above the lake
Stars reflected in still water
Silence fills the night
